findings.message: Post endpoint accepts owner_email in ItemCreate schema but does not store it - unnecessary PII collection violates data minimization principle
findings.suggestion: Either remove owner_email from ItemCreate schema if it should not be collected, or modify create_item() to accept and store the email address when provided
